chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc Application No.S-732 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A No.10776/25. 29.12.2025. Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan, Advocate for Applicant / Contemnor (Mst. Saira). Mr. Saeed Ahmed Janwari, Advocate for Respondent / Applicant (Abdul Khalique). Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy Prosecutor General for State alongwith Inspector Muhammad Aslam on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and ASI Mumtaz Ali on behalf of SHO PS Jamshoro. ***************************************** SSP Jamshoro and SHO PS Jamshoro in compliance of order passed by this Court have submitted reports respectively, which are taken on record. Accordingly, the Contempt Application is disposed of in term of order dated 11.11.2025 passed by this Court, which is already in force. The representative of concerned SHO undertakes compliance of the order passed on 11.11.2025. The children have, once again, after meeting with father / Respondent in Court today have been handed over to the mother. JUDGE Ali.
